# servicenow_ui_script (Data Source)

`servicenow_ui_script` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single UI Script in ServiceNow by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing UI Script in ServiceNow by name.
data "servicenow_ui_script" "example" {
  name = "MyExistingUIScript"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the UI Script.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) If set to 'true', this UI Script is enabled and available for use.
- `api_name` (String) The scoped API name of the UI Script.
- `description` (String) Description of the UI Script.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
- `script` (String) The JavaScript body of the UI Script.
- `type` (String) The UI type this script applies to. Valid values are 'all', 'desktop', or 'mobile'.
